tool.name: rate_limit_tester
tool.description: Test and analyze API rate limiting implementation.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect if rate limiting exists on an endpoint - Find rate limit threshold - Test common bypass techniques (headers, paths) - Analyze rate limit implementation details

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - detect: Detect if rate limiting exists and find threshold - test_bypass: Test common bypass techniques (headers, paths) - analyze: Analyze rate limit implementation details

parameter.name: method
parameter.description: HTTP method to use (GET or POST). Default: GET

returns.description: Rate limit detection results, bypass potential, and analysis

tool.examples:
# Detect rate limiting
detect https://api.example.com/endpoint
# Test bypass techniques
test_bypass https://api.example.com/endpoint
# Analyze rate limit implementation
analyze https://api.example.com/endpoint
